title: Google Videos Scraper
description: Search Google Videos with query, localization, pagination, safe search, and advanced Google SERP filters.

queries.title: Search Queries
queries.description: Recommended. Process many Google Videos keyword searches in one Apify run so run startup and storage overhead are shared across video results.

q.title: Legacy Search Query
q.description: Backward-compatible single keyword or phrase to search in Google Videos. Prefer Search Queries for normal usage, especially when running more than one keyword.

page.title: Page
page.description: Page number for pagination. Cannot be used together with start.

start.title: Start Offset
start.description: Zero-based Google result offset. Cannot be used together with page.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter interface language code, such as en, de, es, or fr.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code for localized Google Videos results, such as us, gb, de, or jp.

google_domain.title: Google Domain
google_domain.description: Google domain to query, such as google.com, google.de, or google.co.uk.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location string for localized results. Cannot be used together with uule.

uule.title: Encoded Location
uule.description: Google UULE encoded location parameter. Cannot be used together with location.

tbs.title: Advanced Filters
tbs.description: Google tbs filter syntax, such as qdr:d for past day, qdr:w for past week, qdr:m for past month, or qdr:y for past year.

filter.title: Filter Similar Results
filter.description: Enable or disable Google's duplicate/similar-result filtering.

nfpr.title: Exclude Auto-Correction
nfpr.description: Set to 1 to exclude auto-corrected query results.

lr.title: Language Restriction
lr.description: Restrict results to a language, such as lang_en.
